Video.summary: Join Lisa Garr as she speaks with millennial Author, Speaker, & Inspirational Entertainer Justin Michael Williams about the true power of healing. Justin discusses creating a future of inclusion and diversity while using music and meditation to spread his message of waking up the world! Info: justinmichaelwilliams.com.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Power of Healing

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Power of Healing
The Aware Show - Power of Healing
The Aware Show - Power of Healing

Video.summary: Feeling overwhelmed? Host Lisa Garr talks with author and women’s empowerment expert Christine Arylo. Finding balance may be challenging, but we can always strive for harmony and flow. Arylo discusses setting boundaries and allowing ourselves space to breathe by finding ways in which we can receive support. Info: christinearylo.com.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Finding Harmony When Overwhelmed

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Finding Harmony When Overwhelmed
The Aware Show - Finding Harmony When Overwhelmed
The Aware Show - Finding Harmony When Overwhelmed

Video.summary: Today Lisa Garr discusses the power of intentions with best-selling author and international speaker Lynne McTaggart. An expert in consciousness, and editor of the magazine “What Doctors Don’t Tell You,” Lynne suggests going for “small wins” which all add up to greater success and flourishing health. Info: lynnemctaggart.com.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Power of Intentions

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Power of Intentions
The Aware Show - Power of Intentions
The Aware Show - Power of Intentions

Video.summary: Today's lesson is on Spirit and how to tune into that space beyond the physical.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 29 Spirit/God Halasana

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 29 Spirit/God Halasana
Yoga Is - Day 29 Spirit/God Halasana
Yoga Is - Day 29 Spirit/God Halasana

Video.summary: Day 30 of our challenge is built around Bridge Pose, a simple backbend.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 30 Freedom Simple Bridge / Urdhva Dhanurasana

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 30 Freedom Simple Bridge / Urdhva Dhanurasana
Yoga Is - Day 30 Freedom Simple Bridge / Urdhva Dhanurasana
Yoga Is - Day 30 Freedom Simple Bridge / Urdhva Dhanurasana

Video.summary: We’ll use the seated pose Padmasana to explore what it means to be happy, peaceful and spiritually at home in your own skin.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 31 Home Padmasana/Seated Pose

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 31 Home Padmasana/Seated Pose
Yoga Is - Day 31 Home Padmasana/Seated Pose
Yoga Is - Day 31 Home Padmasana/Seated Pose

Video.summary: 3x GRAMMY winner, J. Ivy, shares his transformation from a shy kid to a spoken word powerhouse. J. Ivy performs. Plus, a story about a bus driver who made a first grader's day, street interviews from NYC, and Daaji discusses the soul's evolution.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Following The Light Inside

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Following The Light Inside
Good Morning Joy - Following The Light Inside
Good Morning Joy - Following The Light Inside

Video.summary: Social media personality Bruce W. Brackett details his triumph over addiction and trauma giving hope to all facing challenges. Plus, head to Rhode Island for a heartwarming tale where students make dreams come true for a security guard.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Power of Positivity

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Power of Positivity
Good Morning Joy - Power of Positivity
Good Morning Joy - Power of Positivity

Video.summary: Thousands applied. 40 of the best people were picked and 8 people earned the right to compete for the Grand Prize. Which ONE of them actually Plays to WIN?
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 5

Image.alt: Play To Win- Episode 5
Play To Win- Episode 5
Play To Win- Episode 5

Video.summary: Lisa Nichols, with cameo appearances by John Assaraf, Sharon Lechter, Dr.Rev Michael Beckwith, Shanda Sumpter, David Meltzer and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Lisa Nichols

Image.alt: World's Greatest Motivators - Lisa Nichols
World's Greatest Motivators - Lisa Nichols
World's Greatest Motivators - Lisa Nichols

Video.summary: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Video.summary: London Bridges Burning Down - Breakdowns are inevitable when Celeste tries to run from her past. Her therapist gives Celeste sound advice on how to spice up her sex life.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Video.summary: Butter Me Up - Celeste returns back to Los Angeles after her journey. Her friends throw her a sex toy birthday party. When an old flame comes back, can he melt her butter? Nikki reveals a trauma from her childhood.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Video.summary: Pearl Necklace - Can a long-desired gift bring Max and Celeste closer together? While Father Cross’s guilty pleasure is exposed, leaving a young family member seeking revenge and Celeste on his trail. A Fundraiser brings Maddy back to the stage with new comic material on the stage of Denim & Diamonds fundraiser for Autism Care Today.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Video.summary: HOPE IS HERE features inspiring and uplifting, relevant and refreshing, personal stories told by cancer survivors, their families, and the loved ones of those who lost the fight against this “emperor of all maladies” and sparked a movement that gives added meaning to their lives. Their moving stories show how the light of hope is salvaged from depths of despair.
Video.title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E1

Image.alt: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E1
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E1
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E1

Video.summary: Lung cancer diagnoses for young, non-smoking individuals are a growing trend. But that didn't intimidate the athletic and courageous lung cancer patient, 21-year-old Jill Costello. Jill's fighting spirit and her desire to help find a cure and eradicate the stigma that only smokers contracted the disease would eventually define her legacy.
Video.title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E2

Image.alt: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E2
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E2
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E2

Video.summary: Hank Baskett was given the grim diagnosis of stage 4 lung cancer almost ten years ago. At the time his thoughts were not of himself but of how he was going to tell his family. In episode 3 of Hope is Here we meet Hank and his family and learn how he was able to push forward towards health with a hopeful attitude and mission that his cancer journey would be, in his words, a joyful one.
Video.title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E3

Image.alt: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E3
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E3
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E3

Video.summary: Gina Hollenbeck is positive about life. Every day she lives with an optimistic desire to overcome and thrive despite a stage 4 lung cancer diagnosis. As a young mother of two boys, she forges ahead towards a vibrant and meaningful journey with a mission to help find a cure for not only herself but for others who suffer from this deadly disease.
Video.title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E4

Image.alt: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E4
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E4
Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E4

Video.summary: As humans, we are constantly struggling between the poles of what we think we want and what is. When we lose touch with the truth of what is, we create and compound our suffering. What narratives are you constructing? Are they in conflict with the truth of the situation? Are you struggling with what is?
Video.title: Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet

Image.alt: Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet
Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet
Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet

Video.summary: The way you recall a memory and the way it actually happened might be completely different. The question is, do you know which version feeds you? We can become so wrapped up in our recollections, we convince ourselves of these untruths. Is that person a monster? Were they wishing you harm? Or were they dealing with a difficult situation in the best way they knew how?
Video.title: My Mother Terrifies Me

Image.alt: My Mother Terrifies Me
My Mother Terrifies Me
My Mother Terrifies Me

Video.summary: Stop focusing on the object of your desires and start focusing on the reason for desiring that object in the first place. When you turn it around, you may find that what you really want is completely different than what you’ve been telling yourself.
Video.title: I Want to Be Famous

Image.alt: I Want to Be Famous
I Want to Be Famous
I Want to Be Famous

Video.summary: A single thought plants the seed of a narrative. You feel lonely and unsupported, so, of course, someone must have abandoned you. Over time, the thought “I feel abandoned” grows into the story of an entire childhood. Let’s uproot the thought and untangle the story.
Video.title: My Mom Didn't Fight for Me

Image.alt: My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
My Mom Didn't Fight for Me

Video.summary: Fear is a fickle partner. While it certainly serves a purpose — keeping us out of danger and forcing us to question our assumptions — if we give too much of ourselves over to fear, it will lead us down paths filled with insecurity, broken social interactions, and a persistent struggle against the way things actually are.
Video.title: My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner

Image.alt: My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner
My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner
My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner

Video.summary: Definitive statements are comforting. They give life structure and clear direction. But what happens when your declarations are at odds with your subconscious desires?
Video.title: I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With

Image.alt: I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With

Video.summary: Today's lesson is a bit of a reality check, as we'll begin to question the current way we look at relationships, romantic or not. How we see ourselves and our relationship to God influences our view of our relationships with other people. Today we're going to examine that view from a place of love.
Video.title: Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey

Image.alt: Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey
Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey
Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey

Video.summary: A miracle happens when you stop thinking with fear and start thinking with love. Your greatest power lies in your mind. To establish stronger connections, you need to go into every situation requesting to be an instrument of love. When you approach your interactions with love, you'll begin to have more miraculous relationships.
Video.title: Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships

Image.alt: Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships
Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships
Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships

Video.summary: In the following lesson, we'll discover how the ego mind influences both our way of thinking and our relationships. We'll also identify the unconscious barriers we've built that cause us to form these judgments and thoughts. That's where the problem is, and that's where the solution lies.
Video.title: Relationships: Overcoming the Ego Mind

Image.alt: Relationships: Overcoming the Ego Mind
Relationships: Overcoming the Ego Mind
Relationships: Overcoming the Ego Mind

Video.summary: The focus of today's lecture is this: atonement. While we decided to act a certain way in the past based on our personality, we can now use this information to improve our current and future relationships.
Video.title: Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth

Image.alt: Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth
Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth
Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth
